summary: Reprint the generated Go skeleton with Printing Press 4.6.1 and merge safe template/test updates while preserving DoorDash-specific runtime patches.
reason: Printing Press 4.6.1 tightened generator output, MCP shellout safety tests, API body truncation behavior, usage-error classification, and manifest printer attribution. The DoorDash repo remains a hybrid: active Node/CycleTLS runtime plus generated Go PP reference tree.
validated_outcome: go test ./... passed in generated-cli after restoring DoorDash-specific session/cart/read patches and tightening PP 4.6.1 test expectations.
